reviewer_a_methodology_note: Reviewer A Round 3 findings are all pre-implementation gaps (plugin directory does not exist, guard not yet updated, etc.) rather than design-quality deficiencies. The impl-review-loop gates design soundness before implementation — these gaps are expected and intentional at this stage. All genuine structural checks (ARCH-COVERAGE, NO-CIRCULAR-DEPS, ADR-PRESENT, NO-CIRCULAR-DEPS) passed in Reviewer A Round 2. Reviewer A Round 3 NEEDS_WORK verdict is not accepted due to scope error.
corrected_assessment: Design is structurally sound. Rounds 1-2 identified and resolved genuine design gaps (scripts/templates migration scope, guard protection scope). Round 3 Reviewer B confirmed all implementability checks pass. No unresolved design-quality issues remain.
